mapper.sql: id, email, password_hash, display_name, korean_level, preferred_model, country, native_language, occupation, years_of_experience, learning_goal, (profile_image_data IS NOT NULL) AS has_profile_image, study_reminders_enabled, study_reminder_hour, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password_hash, display_name, korean_level, preferred_model ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{koreanLevel}, #{preferredModel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, korean_level = #{koreanLevel}, country = COALESCE(#{country}, country), native_language = COALESCE(#{nativeLanguage}, native_language), occupation = COALESCE(#{occupation}, occupation), years_of_experience = COALESCE(#{yearsOfExperience}, years_of_experience), learning_goal = COALESCE(#{learningGoal}, learning_goal), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET preferred_model = #{preferredModel}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET study_reminders_enabled = #{enabled}, study_reminder_hour = #{hour}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET profile_image_content_type = #{contentType}, profile_image_data = #{data}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
